posts.author: reeshav (RK)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone!

I’m here to talk about something new and handy—Copy Item Pro. It’s a tool we made to help you easily copy our tasks and info from one workspace to another on monday.com. This is especially useful because the usual way on monday.com doesn’t let us copy things from one workspace to another, or copy subitems at all.

Why you might like Copy Item Pro:

  • Move tasks easily: You can copy tasks, assignments, and other info not just within the same board but across different workspaces.
  • Handle subitems: No hassle in copying subitems anymore; do it smoothly with just a couple of clicks.

We know dealing with repetitive tasks can be a drag. That’s why we built Copy Item Pro—to save you time and cut down on the boring stuff.

We want your input: As we keep improving Copy Item Pro, we’d really love to hear from you. What do you think about it? Is there something else you wish it could do? Your ideas and feedback are important to us, and they help make the tool better for everyone.

Try it out: Give Copy Item Pro a go and see how it makes managing your projects easier. Let us know how it works for you and any suggestions you have.

Get started with Copy Item Pro

Thanks for checking this out, and I’m looking forward to hearing all your feedback!

posts.author: reeshav (RK)
posts.cookedHtml: This thread will serve as a public roadmap so that we can serve you better. Any suggestions can be put here directly and we will get back to you.
